operation.name: addOffsetPtr_at_postproc_job_desc_query
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun completions_present () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun desc_index () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (and  (=  false (=  (_ bv0 32) (concat  (select  completions_present (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  completions_present (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  completions_present (_ bv1 32) ) (select  completions_present (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (bvult  (concat  (select  desc_index (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_index (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_index (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_index (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: postproc_job.desc_count is interpreted consistently across all live consumers
assumptions: resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
